behavior_summary: Implements the 'U8P_DARTBORD::look' (examine) event handler for the dart board item (DARTBORD::look).
When a player/actor examines the dart board, the script constructs the literal string "dart board " and asks the item/process system to 'bark' that text to the examining actor (via Item::bark).
The routine uses the caller/actor context passed into the handler (inferred from the push from [BP+06h]) as the target for the bark.

After invoking Item::bark it handles the call's return value (stored briefly in a local named retval), clears temporaries, then suspends/returns, indicating the U8P_DARTBORD::look interaction is complete.
No global flags are read or written by this handler in the observed excerpt.
notable_control_flow: Entry on the 'U8P_DARTBORD::look' event (Event 0) for the DARTBORD item invokes U8P_DARTBORD::look.
U8P_DARTBORD::look pushes the actor/context and the literal string "dart board ", then calls the external routine Item::bark.
The return value from Item::bark is captured into a local (retval), processed via an imply/pop sequence, then discarded.
Function ends by suspending the process and returning control to the engine (no further game-state modifications observed).
open_questions: Is the value passed at [BP+06h] always the player PID, or can other actor/process types trigger the U8P_DARTBORD::look? (inferred as actor/context; confirmation needed)
Does Item::bark perform any side-effects beyond displaying text (e.g., logging, quest triggers) in other contexts that could affect game state here?
Are there any unseen preconditions or item info flags set elsewhere that change how this U8P_DARTBORD::look handler behaves under special circumstances?

main_function.name: U8P_DARTBORD::look
main_function.purpose: Handle the examine/U8P_DARTBORD::look event for the dart board by emitting a short descriptive bark ('dart board ') to the examining actor, then suspend/return.
entry_conditions: Event 0 (U8P_DARTBORD::look) — triggered when a player/actor inspects the dart board item

function_map.name: U8P_DARTBORD::look
function_map.role: Primary event handler for the dart board's 'U8P_DARTBORD::look' event; prepares and routes a short description to the viewer.

function_map.name: Item::bark
function_map.role: Engine/item system routine that displays or broadcasts a short text message from an item/process to a target actor/process.

external_calls.purpose: Deliver a short descriptive string ('dart board ') to the examining actor/process so the item can 'speak' its label.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Implements the 'U8P_DARTBORD::look' (examine) event handler for the dart board item (DARTBORD::look).
